coarse_alignment_reason: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.
chinese_text:
彼汾沮洳，言采其莫。彼其之子，美無度；美無度，殊異乎公路。
彼汾一方，言采其桑。彼其之子，美如英；美如英，殊異乎公行。
彼汾一曲，言采其藚。彼其之子，美如玉；美如玉，殊異乎公族。
translation_text:
1 There in the oozy grounds of the Hwun
They gather the sorrel.
Is elegant beyond measure.
He is elegant beyond measure
But, perhaps, he is not what the superintendent of the ruler^
carriages ought to be.
There along the side of the Hwun,
They gather the mulberry leaves.
